tuning: E A D G B E
content:
This is my first tab and its pretty damn accurate.
Those who say it should be Dm instead of D aren't wrong.
Personally, I just think Acoustically, it sounds better with D, but, to each their own!

Here's how I play it.

Mike Posner
Cooler Than Me

Standard Tuning

[tab]Chords Used:
      [ch]Eb[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]Gm[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]
||----6---------5----------3--------8-----||
||----8---------7----------3--------10----||
||----8---------7----------3--------10----||
||----8---------7----------5--------10----||
||----6---------5----------5--------8-----||
||----x---------x----------3--------x-----||[/tab]



[Chorus]
[tab]           [ch]Eb[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]
If I could write you a song,[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Gm[/ch]
To make you fall in love, [/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Eb[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]Gm[/ch]
I would already have you up under my arm.[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Eb[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]
I used up all my tricks,[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Gm[/ch]
I hope that you like this.[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Eb[/ch]                               [ch]F[/ch]
But you probably won't, you think you're cooler than me.[/tab]

[tab]         [ch]Eb[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
You got designer shades, [/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Gm[/ch]
Just to hide your face and[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Eb[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]
You wear them around like, [/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Gm[/ch]
You're cooler than me.[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Eb[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
But, you never say hey, [/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Gm[/ch]
Or remember my name, and[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Eb[/ch]                               [ch]F[/ch]
It's probably cause, you think you're cooler than me.[/tab]

[Verse 1]
[tab]        [ch]Eb[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]
You got your high brow,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]
Shoes on your feet, [/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Eb[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]
And you wear them around, [/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Gm[/ch]
Like they aint shit.[/tab]

But you don't know, [/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Gm[/ch]
The way that you look, [/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Eb[/ch]                      [ch]F[/ch] (strum once)
When your steps- Make- That- Much- Noise. . .      Shh [/tab]

I got you, [/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Gm[/ch]
All figured out, [/tab]

Girl, you're so vain, [/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Gm[/ch]            
You probably think [/tab]

that this song is about you. Don't you? Don't you?[/tab]
